User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Desi Content Creator application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity.

photo.description: URL of the user's profile photo.

language.description: User's preferred language (Hinglish, Hindi, or English).

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.description: Represents a single chat session between the user and the AI.

id.description: Unique identifier for the chat session.

userId.description: Reference to User. (Relationship: User 1:N Chat).  The user who initiated the chat.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents a single message within a chat session.

id.description: Unique identifier for the chat message.

chatId.description: Reference to Chat. (Relationship: Chat 1:N ChatMessage). The chat session this message belongs to.

userMessage.description: The message sent by the user.

aiReply.description: The AI's response to the user message.

time.description: Timestamp indicating when the message was sent.

Image.title: Image
Image.description: Represents an image generated by the AI.

id.description: Unique identifier for the generated image.

userId.description: Reference to User. (Relationship: User 1:N Image). The user who generated the image.

prompt.description: The text prompt used to generate the image.

time.description: Timestamp indicating when the image was generated.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. The 'userId' parameter identifies the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores chat sessions for each user. The 'userId' parameter identifies the user, and 'chatId' identifies the chat session.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: chatId
params.description: The unique identifier for the chat session.

definition.description: Stores individual chat messages within a chat session.  The 'userId' parameter identifies the user, 'chatId' identifies the chat session and 'messageId' identifies the message.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: chatId
params.description: The unique identifier for the chat session.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique identifier for the chat message.

definition.description: Stores images generated by the user. The 'userId' parameter identifies the user, and 'imageId' identifies the image.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: imageId
params.description: The unique identifier for the image.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore data structure is designed to ensure secure access and efficient data management for the Desi Content Creator application. User data, chat messages, and generated images are stored in separate collections to align with the application's features and access control requirements. The design adheres to the principles of Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and Access Modeling. Specifically, the `chats/{userId}/{chatId}/messages/{messageId}` and `images/{userId}/{imageId}` structures ensure that only the user can access their own chat history and images, simplifying security rules and enhancing privacy. Since history is not persisted, there is no history path. The absence of a global roles collection reflects the application's focus on user-centric content generation. This structure supports QAPs through path-based ownership, ensuring that list operations are secure by default, as only the authenticated user's data is accessible. The use of hierarchical paths `/users/{userId}/chats/{chatId}/messages/{messageId}` clearly defines ownership and facilitates secure data retrieval.
